notes: P62 defines search need records only. It does not implement a runtime need store, persistent need storage, telemetry, public query logging, demand-count runtime, probe enqueueing, candidate-index mutation, result-cache mutation, miss-ledger mutation, local-index mutation, or master-index mutation.

P63 defines probe queue items as contract-only future work requests; search needs still do not enqueue probes, mutate source cache, mutate evidence ledger, mutate candidates, or call external sources.

P64 defines candidate index records as contract-only provisional review items; search needs still do not create candidates, promote candidates, mutate source cache, mutate evidence ledger, or mutate the master index.

Search needs are scoped, reviewable unresolved needs derived from privacy-filtered future inputs. They are not search results, miss ledger entries, probe jobs, candidate records, demand dashboards, or authoritative truth.
P66 Known Absence Page v0 is future/contract-only and does not add runtime pages, telemetry, probes, or mutation.

P67 Query Privacy and Poisoning Guard v0 is future/contract-only and adds no runtime guard, telemetry, account/IP tracking, query-intelligence mutation, index mutation, external calls, or live probes.
